code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
let n = parts.len()
mut out = ""
mut i = n - 1
while i >= 0
  let item = match parts.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  if i == n - 1
    out = "#{item}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{item}"
  end
  i = i - 1
end
print(out)
